examples.title: Software Process Framework
examples.description: A structured approach to developing software
examples.code:
BEGIN
  // Phases of software development life cycle
  planning()
  analysis()
  design()
  implementation()
  testing()
  deployment()
  maintenance()
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode illustrates the concept of a software process framework, with a focus on the phases of the software development life cycle.
